---
agent: instructuions-generator
---

Take the information below and generate an [NAME].instructions.md file for it in the /.github/instructions. Generate an appropriate name for the [NAME] placeholder based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. If no information is provided blow, prompt the user to give the neccessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standartds to document.
The .md file should have frontmatter with a description property that informs copilot of when to use this set of instructions.
